title: Better Structures Maps
description: Client-side mod that renders precise block distance to map decorations including woodland mansions, ocean monuments, villages, trial chambers, swamp hut, treasures...
body:
---

# 🗺️ Better Map — Distance Tracking for Minecraft Maps

**Better Map** is a small client-side Fabric mod that makes your in-game maps smarter.
It shows **real-time distance to nearby structures** right on the map — so you’ll always know how far you are from that Woodland Mansion or Ocean Monument!

---

## ✨ Features

### 📏 Live Distance Display

* Shows the exact block distance to mapped structures
* Updates automatically as you move
* Clean and easy-to-read text overlay on your map

### 🏛️ Supported Structures

Better Map can display distance to:

* 🏰 **Woodland Mansions**
* 🌊 **Ocean Monuments**
* 🏘️ **Villages** (Desert, Plains, Savanna, Snowy, Taiga)
* ⚔️ **Trial Chambers**
* 🌴 **Jungle Temples**
* 🧙 **Swamp Huts**
* ❌ **Buried Treasures** (Red X markers)

### ⚙️ Customizable Settings

* Toggle distance labels on or off anytime
* Automatically saves your preferences in `config/better_map.json`

### 🌍 Localization

Currently available in:

* 🇬🇧 **English (en_us)**
* 🇷🇺 **Russian (ru_ru)**

---

## 📸 How It Works

1. Explore your world and find structures
2. Open a map in your hand
3. Distance labels appear below structure icons automatically
4. You can toggle the feature anytime via Mod Menu

---

## 🔧 Installation

### Requirements

* **Minecraft**: 1.21.8
* **Java**: 21 or higher

### Required Mods

(checked automatically at startup)

* [Cloth Config API](https://modrinth.com/mod/cloth-config) ≥ 17.0.0
* [Mod Menu](https://modrinth.com/mod/modmenu) ≥ 13.0.0

---

## ⚙️ Configuration

Open **Mod Menu → Better Map** to adjust:

* **Show Distance Labels**: toggle the overlay on or off
* All settings save automatically

Config file location: `.minecraft/config/better_map.json`

---
